examples: Pundits who want to sound judicious are fond of warning against generalizing.
The president authorizes the judicious use of military force to protect our citizens.
McCarron said ConAgra's lower estimate stemmed from its more judicious use of hypertension data.
Dell continues to build out its enterprise portfolio with judicious investments in infrastructure technology.
To be sure, some of them are so bad readers might wish for more judicious culling.
